message:
style: migrate once_cell::Lazy to std::sync::LazyLock

Replace deprecated once_cell::sync::Lazy with the standard library's
std::sync::LazyLock which was stabilized in Rust 1.80.

Files updated:
- src/beads/version.rs
- src/quality/ubs.rs
- src/security/acip.rs
- src/security/secret_scanner.rs

This reduces clippy warnings (non_std_lazy_statics) by 8.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
